titles.title: Safeguarding Taxpayer Dollars in Child Care Act of 2026
Safeguarding Taxpayer Dollars in Child Care Act
Safeguarding Taxpayer Dollars in Child Care Act of 2026
To amend the Child Care and Development Block Grant Act of 1990 to debar child care providers that committed fraud from receiving financial assistance under the Act, and for other purposes.

action.text: Referred to the House Committee on Education and Workforce.
Committee Consideration and Mark-up Session Held
Ordered to be Reported (Amended) by the Yeas and Nays: 20 - 15.
Reported (Amended) by the Committee on Education and Workforce. H. Rept. 119-589.

calendar.text: Placed on the Union Calendar, Calendar No. 509.

committee.name: House Education and Workforce
committee.activity: Reported By, Markup By, Referred To
